headline: Netflix vs. Disney: Which Streaming Stock Is the Better Long-Term Hold?
summary: For a retirement-focused investor choosing between Netflix (NASDAQ:NFLX) and The Walt Disney Company (NYSE:DIS), which streaming giant deserves a slot in the portfolio right now? Both have transformed since the streaming wars began, but they offer fundamentally different risk and reward profiles. Netflix is the lean, scaled growth machine. headline: The One Very Simple Reason ‘60 Minutes’ Imploded
summary: Then there’s the real world—the one where readers and viewers lap up celebrity updates, clickbait headlines, and bleed-and-lead news segments.  The weekly  CBS  newsmagazine made its bones with its investigative journalism, delving into how the tobacco industry manipulated nicotine levels, or revealing fatal flaws in the U.S. military’s MV-22 Osprey aircraft.  It turns out that people will tune into investigative stories, if you make them compelling and relevant enough.
